blocks.html:
Inventory

Current stock on hand. Add an item below and it'll appear in the table instantly.

SKUNameQtyPrice
Loading inventory…

Add item
blocks.css: .inv-wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:48px 20px}.inv-head h2{margin:0 0 6px;font-size:1.7rem}.inv-head p{margin:0 0 28px;opacity:.7}.inv-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 320px;gap:24px;align-items:start}@media(max-width:780px){.inv-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}.inv-tablecard{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);overflow:hidden}.inv-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:.94rem}.inv-table th,.inv-table td{text-align:left;padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08)}.inv-table th.num,.inv-table td.num{text-align:right;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.inv-table th{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.6;font-weight:600}.inv-table tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0}.inv-table td.low{color:#fbbf24;font-weight:600}.inv-empty{text-align:center;opacity:.6;padding:28px 16px}.inv-form{border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.inv-form h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:1.1rem}.inv-form label{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;opacity:.9}.inv-form input{padding:11px 13px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);background:rgba(0,0,0,.3);color:inherit;font-size:.95rem}.inv-form button{margin-top:4px;padding:13px 18px;border:0;border-radius:10px;font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem;cursor:pointer;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#22d3ee);color:#06070d}.inv-form button:disabled{opacity:.6;cursor:default}.inv-msg{margin:2px 0 0;min-height:1.1em;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600}.inv-msg.ok{color:#34d399}.inv-msg.err{color:#fb7185}
blocks.js: (function(){var SAMPLE=[{sku:'WID-001',name:'Widget, large',quantity:48,price:12.5},{sku:'BOLT-204',name:'Hex bolt M8 (100pk)',quantity:6,price:8.75},{sku:'CBL-USB-C',name:'USB-C cable, 2m',quantity:130,price:5.2}];var rows=document.getElementById('inv-rows');function esc(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"',"'":'''}[c];});}function money(p){var n=Number(p);return isNaN(n)?esc(p):'$'+n.toFixed(2);}function qtyCell(q){var n=Number(q);var low=!isNaN(n)&&n<=10;return ''+esc(q)+'';}function render(list){if(!list||!list.length){rows.innerHTML='No items yet — add your first SKU.';return;}rows.innerHTML=list.map(function(i){return ''+esc(i.sku)+''+esc(i.name)+''+qtyCell(i.quantity)+''+money(i.price)+'';}).join('');}function load(){fetch('/api/data/items').then(function(r){return r.ok?r.json():null;}).then(function(d){var list=d&&(d.records||d.items||d.data||(Array.isArray(d)?d:null));if(!list||!list.length){render(SAMPLE);}else{render(list);}}).catch(function(){render(SAMPLE);});}var f=document.getElementById('inv-form');var btn=document.getElementById('inv-submit');var msg=document.getElementById('inv-msg');f.addEventListener('submit',function(e){e.preventDefault();var sku=(document.getElementById('inv-sku').value||'').trim();var name=(document.getElementById('inv-name').value||'').trim();var quantity=(document.getElementById('inv-qty').value||'').trim();var price=(document.getElementById('inv-price').value||'').trim();msg.className='inv-msg';if(!sku||!name){msg.textContent='SKU and name are required.';msg.className='inv-msg err';return;}btn.disabled=true;var orig=btn.textContent;btn.textContent='Adding…';fetch('/api/data/items',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({sku:sku,name:name,quantity:quantity,price:price})}).then(function(r){if(!r.ok)throw new Error('bad');return r.json();}).then(function(){f.reset();msg.textContent='Item added.';msg.className='inv-msg ok';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;load();}).catch(function(){msg.textContent='Something went wrong. Please try again.';msg.className='inv-msg err';btn.textContent=orig;btn.disabled=false;});});load();})();
